## Checklist

- [ ] Preserves the offline/no-key path (core flows work without a Gemini key)
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies, or they were discussed in an issue
- [ ] Validates external input with Zod
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` committed
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` / `OVERVIEW.md` / `CHANGELOG.md` / `docs/`) if
      behavior or setup changed
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
